notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Jeff McNeil. J.P. Crawford to 3rd. Josh Naylor to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Jeff McNeil. J.P. Crawford to 3rd. Josh Naylor to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Henry Bolte GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Henry Bolte grounds into a double play, shortstop J.P. Crawford to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Josh Naylor. Tyler Soderstrom out at 2nd. Henry Bolte out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Henry Bolte rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Henry Bolte grounds into a double play, shortstop J.P. Crawford to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Josh Naylor. Tyler Soderstrom out at 2nd. Henry Bolte out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Colt Emerson grounds into a force out, first baseman Nick Kurtz to shortstop Darell Hernaiz. Cole Young scores. Jhonny Pereda out at 2nd. Colt Emerson to 1st. Throwing error by shortstop Darell Hernaiz.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Colt Emerson grounds into a force out, first baseman Nick Kurtz to shortstop Darell Hernaiz. Cole Young scores. Jhonny Pereda out at 2nd. Colt Emerson to 1st. Throwing error by shortstop Darell Hernaiz.

notableEvents.label: Jeff McNeil GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jeff McNeil grounds into a double play, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop J.P. Crawford to first baseman Josh Naylor. Jonah Heim scores. Henry Bolte out at 2nd. Jeff McNeil out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Josh Naylor reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Jeff McNeil. J.P. Crawford to 3rd. Josh Naylor to 2nd.
